caption: In a recording studio setting, a man with dark skin wears a light-colored button-down shirt, a red and white patterned bowtie, tan suspenders, and a tall, grey, pointed wig. He wears black headphones and glasses while speaking into a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with framed photographs and clothing racks featuring "LEE" branded apparel. The "GLOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" logo appears on the left side of the screen, while "GLOSS TALK JOY" is written in red text on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, gesturing with his right hand to emphasize his speech. His hand moves slightly closer to his chest and then outward as he continues talking, while his facial expression remains focused and serious.
